tasks.label: 🧹 Kill Dev Processes
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'cargo-watch.*neuro' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'neuro-backend' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'vite.*neuro-ui' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'vite.*neuro-admin' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; echo '✓ Cleaned'

tasks.label: 🦀 Backend (Rust)
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'cargo-watch.*neuro' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'neuro-backend' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; cd neuro-backend && DATABASE_URL=ws://127.0.0.1:8000 DATABASE_USER=root DATABASE_PASS=neuroos_secret_2024 OLLAMA_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 SEARXNG_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 VOICE_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8100 RUST_LOG=warn cargo watch -x run

tasks.label: ⚛️ User UI (Vite)
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'vite.*neuro-ui' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-ui && npm run dev

tasks.label: 🔧 Admin UI (Vite)
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'vite.*neuro-admin' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd neuro-admin && npm run dev

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop All Dev
tasks.command: pkill -f 'cargo watch' ; pkill -f 'neuro-backend' ; pkill -f 'vite.*neuro-ui' ; pkill -f 'vite.*neuro-admin' ; echo '✅ All dev processes stopped'
